subject: Lunda
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: MWATELA KUWUZATISHILA IWU MUKANDA
topics: Muniwu mukanda mudi yuma yezhima yatela kutañishewa mu Temu 1 yamu Fomu
Litilicha. Hampinji yakuloñesha nakusoneka yuma yakutañisha mundizilu, watela
kusakula yuma yalema yiwatela kushinshikahu niyuma hela nyidimu nawa
yiwukukeña atudizi kwila hela kuzata hachuma hichuma chinakukuhwelelewawu
kwilukisha. Dichi, ndizilu yikwikala hela yinatweshi kwikala nayuma yakubadika hadi
assessment: Iwu mutu wansañu wunakushinshika ha hakuwaha kwa Litilicha. Mumutu wansañu
weniwu mudi nawa cheñi nyitu yansañu yanyanya yidi neyi kulumbulula izu da
